title: Preserve Group 21 status: G21-9: ordinary source routing
description: Result: rho/M_enc remains routed to A-sector; non-A duplicate source channels are forbidden, diagnostic, role-level, or theorem-targeted. Status: PROTECTED. Consequence: ordinary matter remains routed through protected channels without duplicate source counting. Handoff: pressure/trace, longitudinal current, transverse current, TT stress, exchange, curvature, H, dark, and accounting routes need separate no-double-counting discipline.
